title: Fix #3470 of incorrect bit op tree optimization

features.name: reduction on cast truncated expression
features.description: Code should include a reduction operation (REDXOR, REDAND, REDOR) applied to a cast expression where the cast truncates a wider signal to narrower type, causing the optimizer to incorrectly ignore the truncation effect

features.name: bit_op_tree_merge_reduction_different_widths
features.description: Code should include multiple reduction operations on the same wider variable operating on different bit ranges, where optimization incorrectly merges them by ignoring width-changing casts

features.name: cast_ignored_in_bit_tree_optimization
features.description: Code should include a sign-cast or type-cast applied to a signal before a reduction operation, where Verilator's bit op tree optimization incorrectly ignores the cast and treats the reduction as operating on the uncast wider type
